title: Load and unload livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Load and unload livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Check facilities and equipment for sound working conditions

pcs.text: Identify facilities and equipment required for the task and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify facilities and equipment required for the task and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify facilities and equipment required for the task and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use loading facilities and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use loading facilities and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use loading facilities and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe work site, facilities, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe work site, facilities, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe work site, facilities, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Carry out or organise repairs and maintenance of facilities and equipment required for loading or unloading livestock where necessary according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out or organise repairs and maintenance of facilities and equipment required for loading or unloading livestock where necessary according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out or organise repairs and maintenance of facilities and equipment required for loading or unloading livestock where necessary according to supervisor instructions.
